infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to share your location during an SOS emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Used to track location during an active SOS alert.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record audio evidence during an SOS emergency.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Used to detect shake gesture for SOS activation.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeGuard needs location access to share your position during an SOS emergency.
